tasks.label: check-git-status
tasks.command: cd /Users/emre/Desktop/Emare/emaregithup && ls -la .git 2>/dev/null && git remote -v && git status --short || echo 'GIT_YOK'

tasks.label: git-init-emaregithup
tasks.command: cd /Users/emre/Desktop/Emare/emaregithup && git init && git remote add origin https://github.com/emraresoftware/emaregithup.git && git add -A && git status --short | head -30 && echo '=== TOPLAM ===' && git status --short | wc -l
